examples: Is there any interviewee who stands out as memorable?
The success depends on good rapport between interviewer and interviewee.
From the cartoon given above, we can observe that there is a recruiter talking with an interviewee.
So, too is the host, Scott McGrew, and guest interviewee, Ben Parr of Mashable.
After watching each video, participants evaluated the interviewee on general competence, trustworthiness and likability.
